channel.title: Kpodemski on PrestaShop Developers' blog
channel.description: Recent content in Kpodemski on PrestaShop Developers' blog

item.title: Announcing PrestaShop Project Live Update March 2026
item.description: The first PrestaShop Project Live Update of 2026 will take place on Tuesday, March 31st, 2026 at 3 PM (Paris time) on YouTube!

item.title: AI-Powered API Hackathon: 14+ Endpoints in a Single Day
item.description: On March 12th, developers from across PrestaShop’s tech teams joined forces for a hackathon, splitting into four teams with one clear mission: accelerate the development of the Admin API.

item.title: Discover the PrestaShop example modules repository
item.description: If you’ve ever read through the PrestaShop developer documentation and thought “this makes sense in theory, but I wish I could see it working in a real module”: the example-modules repository is exactly what you’re looking for.

item.title: PrestaShop Core Monthly - February 2026
item.description: February was a month of meaningful progress for PrestaShop. Two new releases (9.0.3, 8.2.4), a major milestone for the Hummingbird theme, and two important announcements about upcoming features make it a month worth looking back at in detail.

item.title: Cleaning up old branches: a routine maintenance for a healthier repository
item.description: Keeping the PrestaShop repository tidy is part of routine maintenance. In January 2026, we are cleaning up a few stale branches from our main repository that are no longer used for releases or active development.

item.title: PrestaShop Core Monthly - January 2026
item.description: We welcomed 2026 with a lot of exciting news and progress across the PrestaShop ecosystem. Read on for a recap of the biggest highlights from January, including the release of PrestaShop 9.1 Beta, deep dives into the new multi-carrier and discounts features, and the first videos from our Developer Conference 2025.

item.title: PrestaShop 2025: Year in Review
item.description: As 2025 comes to a close, it’s time to reflect on an incredible year for the PrestaShop project. From the highly anticipated release of PrestaShop 9 to the vibrant gatherings at FOP Days and the Developer Conference, this year has been defined by innovation, collaboration, and the unwavering dedication of our community.

item.title: Call for contributions: Admin API - great start!
item.description: Two months ago, we launched our second Call for Contributions initiative, this time focusing on the Admin API. We’re excited to share the progress that’s been made!

item.title: PrestaShop Core Monthly - October 2025
item.description: October has been an exceptional month for the PrestaShop project! We released the first maintenance version of PrestaShop 9, opened registration for our biggest community event of the year, and watched the Admin API contribution initiative gain incredible momentum. Let’s dive into what made this month so special.

item.title: PrestaShop Core Monthly - September 2025
item.description: Welcome to the September edition of the Core Monthly! This month was buzzing with activity around PrestaShop 9, with the team working on its first patch release and the community stepping up to expand the new Admin API. We also saw some fantastic new tools and improvements, all thanks to dedicated contributors.

item.title: PrestaShop Core Monthly - August 2025
item.description: Welcome to the August edition of Core Monthly. This month brought an important security patch for 8.2, a new community feature in the back office, and a fresh call for contributions to expand the Admin API in PrestaShop 9.

item.title: Meet the PrestaShop Wall of Fame
item.description: From its very first release, PrestaShop has been built and improved thanks to the dedication of its open source community. Today, we’re introducing a new way to celebrate that dedication - directly in your back office.

item.title: Call for contributions: Admin API
item.description: After the success of our first Call for Contributions focused on hooks, it’s time to launch a new round. This time, we’re inviting the community to contribute to one of the most significant changes in PrestaShop 9: the new Admin API.

item.title: PrestaShop Core Monthly - July 2025
item.description: We are back with the July edition of the PrestaShop Core Monthly! 🌞

item.title: PrestaShop Live Update - July 2025
item.description: On July 30th, 2025, we hosted another Live Update for the PrestaShop Project, highlighting the announcement of the upcoming One Page Checkout (OPC) feature in PrestaShop 9.1. We also covered the current state of the project, recent releases, and ongoing contribution initiatives, including the Admin API.
